notes: Phase 1 (Naxxramas 25, The Obsidian Sanctum, The Eye of Eternity) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Arms Warrior Dps gear guide. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-3 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Enchants/gems reused from the matching wotlk/p4 spec profile (same stat priorities apply across phases).

items.name: Favor of the Dragon Queen
items.source: Heroic Judgment at the Eye of Eternity quest reward — Eye of Eternity 25-Man

items.name: Valorous Dreadnaught Shoulderplates
items.source: Multiple Bosses, Emblem Vendors (60 Emblem of Valor ) — Naxxramas 25-Man, Dalaran

items.source: Multiple Bosses — Naxxramas 25-Man Darkmoon Nobles Deck

items.source: Multiple Bosses — Naxxramas 25-Man Darkmoon Nobles Deck

gems.name: Relentless Earthsiege Diamond (+37 crit, +3% crit damage — meta requirements must be met)
Fractured Cardinal Ruby (+23 crit) — or Bold Cardinal Ruby (+23 Str)
Inscribed Ametrine / Etched Ametrine (Str+crit or Str+hit) — or Rigid King's Amber (+16 crit) for socket bonus
Nightmare Tear (activates the meta gem by itself)
